0.text: Pleural and parenchymal scarring in the apices of both lungs

1.text: Several subcentimeter bullae in the upper lobes of both lungs

2.text: Dependent density increases in the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: Nonspecific nodules measuring 4 mm and 2.2 mm in the apex of the right lung

5.text: Nonspecific nodules smaller than 5 mm in the upper lobe of the right lung
